inline_comments.message: I am not sure whether it is a good idea - properties in parent section are prohibited for mvn < 3.5. I suppose it will work on CI as there is version 3.5 installed but some devs can reach a problem here.
oparent version should be a param too.

As was mentioned - it wont compile even on jenkins job:

09:09:32 [ERROR] [ERROR] Some problems were encountered while processing the POMs:
